_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: In both Nf1 P1 mutants and Nf1 RNAi lines, there was an increase in pERK, with no detectable change in total ERK levels (Fig. 7d).
details: Successfully detected total ERK levels by western blot, showing no detectable change in total ERK levels despite increased phosphorylation
